kept.text:
The NFL has a new short king 👑

Diego Pavia will be the first quarterback in the NFL under 5-foot-10 since Eddie LeBaron in 1963 🤯

(h/t via: Stathead) https://t.co/xXxgWmZPlH

The newest MLB home run leader....

Munetaka Murakami. https://t.co/UoDXIQasbl

Boss said if we hit 400k by 6pm, I get tomorrow off. 

Don't mess this up for me…

The largest prize pool in fantasy football history is now live at DraftKings! $20 MILLION.

$3,000,000 to 1st
$2,000,000 to 2nd
$1,000,000 to 3rd
And even more out there to claim.

DraftKings is the best place to play Best Ball in 2026 🗣️ https://t.co/cepkorgHjy

Aaron Judge & Ben Rice make Yankee history hitting dingers 💫

(h/t @SlangsOnSports) https://t.co/2lS1usj3Jw

Dallas Mavericks who have won the NBA Rookie Of The Year Award:

🏆 1994-95: Jason Kidd (tie with Grant Hill)
🏆 2018-19: Luka Doncic
🏆 2025-26: Cooper Flagg

The Cardinals took Jeremiyah Love 3rd overall, expecting him to be a major weapon in both the run and pass game.

Meanwhile, the Raiders still don’t have a clear WR1.

With that in mind… would you take Brock Bowers over Trey McBride in fantasy? 🤔 https://t.co/0jQ2N7r0jT

Jamal Cain really gave us the best poster dunk of this year's playoffs so far 🤯

(📷: Gary Bassing/NBAE via Getty Images) https://t.co/abNGJ5WHmh

MLB Free Play ⚾️

Chad Patrick Under 4.5 Strikeouts (-150, DraftKings)

50% off for the full card 👇
